children.text: Make sure to wear some flowers in your hair 🎶

This Jodel is like the good old Yik Yak just on shrooms 😄

Already told all my pals about it. If we get all Yaks to use Jodel instead it will be as active as Yak was.
I wanted to smoke a joint with immigrants, when I asked for papers they ran away!
Unfortunately there aren't Jodel around you ☹️ Click on the "+" button and be the first one 🏆
J O I N  T H E  C H A N N E L
